channel.title: Krishna, Ranjay on Chege's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Krishna, Ranjay on Chege's Blog

item.title: [ToDo] CS231n: Convolutional Neural Networks for Visual Recognition
item.description:
Image Classification; Linear Classification; Optimization; Backpropagation; Neural Networks; Convolutional Neural Networks; Understanding and Visualizing Convolutional Neural Networks; Transfer Learning and Fine-tuning Convolutional Neural Networks.

  1. CS231n: Convolutional Neural Networks for Visual Recognition. Fei-Fei Li; Ranjay Krishna; Danfei Xu. cs231n.stanford.edu . 2020.
